© 2026 Egypt-EV by Z Solutions. All rights reserved.

Terms of Access

  • Educational Use: Files are provided for learning and testing only.
  • Compatibility: Success varies by model; we do not guarantee it works for all.
  • Responsibility: Use at your own risk. We are not liable for any vehicle damage.
  • No Support: This is a community resource, not official support.

شروط الدخول

  • لأغراض تعليمية: الملفات متوفرة للتعلم والتجربة فقط.
  • التوافق: النجاح يختلف حسب الطراز؛ لا نضمن عملها للجميع.
  • المسؤولية: الاستخدام على مسؤوليتك. نحن غير مسؤولين عن أي ضرر للسيارة.
  • لا يوجد دعم: هذا مورد مجتمعي وليس دعماً رسمياً.

Applications

Head-unit APK Library

Direct APK downloads sourced from trusted mirrors. Play Store does not run on BYD head units.

Tutorials & Guides

Installation Guides

Step-by-step instructions to get everything working on your BYD head unit.

تعليمات خطوة بخطوة لتشغيل كل شيء على نظام BYD الخاص بك

Installing microG Services

تثبيت خدمات microG

Required

Required for YouTube ReVanced and other modified apps

Do not use Phone Clone or any transfer utility — fresh install only

  1. 1Remove any previous microG / Gbox install and clear residues with SD Maid SE
  2. 2Install microG GmsCore from the official GitHub release
  3. 3Install microG Companion
  4. 4Grant all permissions: Settings > Apps > microG Services
  5. +2 more steps...

Silent Installer for Leopard / Denza

Silent Installer لـ ليوبارد / دينزا

Leopard/Denza

Install APKs silently via USB drive

Only for BYD Leopard and Denza models

  1. 1Download SilentInstaller.zip from the Yandex drive
  2. 2Extract the zip file
  3. 3Format a USB drive as FAT32
  4. 4Copy the extracted files to the root of the USB drive
  5. +2 more steps...

Flashing Stock Firmware via USB

تحديث البرنامج الثابت عبر USB

All Models

Restore or update your BYD head unit firmware

Alternative: long press 'Previous' + 'Volume wheel' to enter engineering mode

  1. 1Download the firmware zip for your Dilink version from the Firmware section
  2. 2Rename the file to UpdateFull.zip
  3. 3Format a USB drive as FAT32
  4. 4Create folder structure: BYDUpdatePackage/msm8953_64/
  5. +4 more steps...
